data.title: Newmont achieves commercial production at Ahafo North in Ghana, following first gold pour on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) declared that its Ahafo North project in Afrisipakrom, Ghana has reached commercial production. This development is regarded as one of the notable mining projects in West Africa. The milestone comes after the project achieved its first gold pour on September 19, 2025. The achievement signifies the successful conclusion of a wide-ranging development initiative, showcasing the significant progress made in the region.

data.title: Enovis to discuss Q3 2025 results in webcast on Nov 6th at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Company also participating in investor conferences. Website for presentation: www.enovis.com.
data.description: Enovis™ Corporation, a leading medical technology growth company listed on the NYSE under the symbol ENOV, is set to hold an investor conference call and live webcast on November 6th, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss their third quarter financial results. A presentation for the call will be accessible on the company's website, www.enovis.com. The earnings press release will be issued earlier that morning. In addition to the conference call, Enovis will be taking part in various investor conferences.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin stable, XRP rises due to cooler inflation. Bitcoin hits $110,643.22, Ethereum $3,915.14. 104,281 traders liquidated for $224.32M. Top losers: MYX Finance, Virtuals Protocol, Zcash.
data.description: Bitcoin maintains its value above $110,000 amidst a spike in inflation, which has reached a nine-month high but falls short of market projections. The current prices for cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $110,643.22, Ethereum at $3,915.14, Solana at $191.63, XRP at $2.48, Dogecoin at $0.1957, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001013. Noteworthy data reveals that 104,281 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in a total loss of $224.32 million. In the same period, top losers in the cryptocurrency market were MYX Finance, Virtuals Protocol, and Zcash. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: E Tech Group to present Zero Defect approach at DCD Connect Virginia 2025 in Leesburg, VA, showcasing 30+ successful projects.
data.description: E Tech Group is set to showcase its Zero Defect strategy for mission-critical data center project implementation during DCD Connect Virginia on November 3-4, 2025, at Lansdowne Resort in Leesburg, VA. The company boasts a track record of successfully delivering more than 30 zero-defect projects in Tier III and IV facilities.

data.title: Nasdaq reports short interest in 3,382 stocks at 13.8B shares on Oct 15, 2025, down from 14.1B shares on Sept 30, 2025. 2.09 days to cover, compared to 2.16 days before.
data.description: In New York on Oct. 24, 2025, it was reported that the short interest in 3,382 Nasdaq Global Market SM securities by the end of the settlement date of October 15, 2025, amounted to 13,834,913,159 shares. This was a decrease from the previous settlement date on September 30, 2025, where short interest in 3,366 Global Market issues totaled 14,078,324,727 shares. The data showed that the short interest in mid-October represented 2.09 days, a slight decrease from the 2.16 days recorded in the prior reporting period.

data.title: Super League completes private placement offering, securing $17.9 million.
data.description: The Super League organization has reported the recent successful completion of a follow-on close of its private placement offering. This has resulted in the company securing a grand total of $17.9 million in funding.

data.title: Core Scientific reported fiscal Q3 2025 results with total revenue at $81.1 million, a decrease from $95.4 million in Q3 2024. Digital asset self-mining revenue was $57.4 million, down from $68.1 million YoY.
data.description: Core Scientific, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter of 2025, reporting total revenue of $81.1 million, a decrease from $95.4 million in the same period last year. Revenue from digital asset self-mining stood at $57.4 million for Q3 2025, down from $68.1 million in the previous year. The company, known for its digital infrastructure and colocation services, experienced a decline primarily attributed to factors not specified in the announcement.

data.title: Ibotta CEO Bryan Leach to speak at Adweek's Brandweek Conference on Nov 4, 2025. Main topic: data, measurement, and optimization in shopping.
data.description: In Denver, Ibotta (NYSE: IBTA) shared that CEO Bryan Leach will join Brandweek, a conference for marketers and brand leaders, on November 4, 2025, at 7:20am PT/10:20am ET. Leach will be on the mainstage with Liquid Death’s Chief Media Officer, Benoit Vatere, to explore the impact of data, measurement, and optimization on the shopping experience. Ibotta runs the largest digital promotions network in North America.

data.title: Accruit's Alex Moore earns CES® Certification, highlighting commitment to excellence in 1031 exchanges.
data.description: Accruit proudly welcomes Alex Moore, Senior Account Executive, who recently obtained the prestigious Certified Exchange Specialist® (CES®) certification on October 24, 2025. This accomplishment highlights Accruit's dedication to professional excellence and leadership within the industry. Alex Moore's certification emphasizes the commitment to quality and expertise in their team, further solidifying Accruit's position as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Salesforce grants equity awards to Bluebirds and Waii employees under Inducement Equity Incentive Plan, issuing 42,844 RSUs to 7.
data.description: In San Francisco, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the leading AI CRM company, revealed that it has issued equity awards through its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan to fresh hires who recently came on board due to the acquisitions of Bluebirds and Waii. The Plan, approved by the Salesforce Board of Directors in July 2014 following NYSE Rule 303A.08, saw the granting of 42,844 restricted stock units ("RSUs") to 7 employees.

data.title: BridgeBio to reveal Phase 3 results for BBP-418 in LGMD2I/R9 FORTIFY Study, and Q3 2025 financial results.
data.description: Palo Alto-based BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBIO) is a unique biopharmaceutical company specializing in genetic diseases. On October 24, 2025, they revealed plans for two business update calls by company executives. These calls will cover important developments in their operations.

data.title: Ben Sasse, 53, appointed to SouthState Bank Corporation board of directors. Winter Haven, Fla. - Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: Today, SouthState Bank Corporation (SSB) based in Winter Haven, Florida, disclosed the appointment of Ben Sasse, 53, to the board of directors of the corporation and its bank subsidiary, SouthState Bank, N.A. Sasse, currently the president emeritus, brings his expertise to the company. SouthState Bank Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol SSB.

data.title: Innocan Pharma to present at 2025 ThinkEquity Conference in Israel, AB. Trading: CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, OTCQB: INNPF.
data.description: Innocan Pharma Corporation, a leading company in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors with tickers CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTCQB: INNPF, is set to take part in The... event. The announcement came from Herzliya, Israel, and Calgary, Alberta, on Oct. 24, 2025.

data.title: Wall Street reaches new highs amidst soft inflation. Fed expected to cut rates with inflation at 3%, below expectations. Markets anticipate more cuts in 2026.
data.description: A better-than-expected report on inflation may lead the Federal Reserve to proceed with a rate cut next week, as markets are now pricing in a 0.25% reduction in the federal funds rate. In September, inflation increased by 3% year-over-year, slightly higher than the 2.9% in August but below economists' predicted 3.1%. Core inflation, excluding food and energy, decreased from 3.1% to 3%, which was a more significant drop than anticipated. This data was well-received on Wall Street, with major indices hitting all-time highs. The market now expects two more rate cuts this year, followed by three in 2026. Following robust corporate earnings and optimism regarding a potential meeting between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping to discuss trade, stocks saw further gains. This positive momentum was further boosted by Michigan's auto giants during the week.

data.title: Stock market reaches new highs; Dow Jones surges by 500 points on inflation data, IBM rebounds lifting AMD.
data.description: Today, there was a significant surge in the stock market as the Dow Jones index increased by 500 points. Additionally, Snowflake broke out of a special base. The Dow reaching new highs was influenced by positive inflation data and IBM rebounding, which also lifted AMD. This demonstrates a strong performance in the market with key players making notable gains.

data.title: Treasure Global grants inducement equity awards to Boon Souw Fung and Tan Ee Wei under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) in Malaysia.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on October 24, 2025, technology company Treasure Global Inc. (NASDAQ: TGL) revealed that it has given approval for the issuance of inducement equity awards to Boon Souw Fung and Tan Ee Wei. The recipients, collectively referred to as the "Grantees," were provided these awards by the Company's Board of Directors in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Treasure Global Inc. is a company rooted in Southeast Asia.

data.title: Kellanova (NYSE: K) declares $0.58 per share dividend for Q4, payable on Dec 15, 2025 to shareholders on record by Dec 1.
data.description: In Chicago on October 24, 2025, Kellanova (NYSE: K) revealed a dividend declaration of $0.58 per share for its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on December 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 1, 2025.

data.title: Ari Steigler's Flux Capital wins "Allocator One Breakout Fund of the Year" award, showing shift to data-driven due diligence.
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Ari Steigler, the founder of Flux Capital, an esteemed alternative asset management firm, revealed that they have been recognized as the Allocator One Breakout Fund of the Year. This announcement comes on October 24, 2025. Flux Capital, under Steigler's leadership, clinched this prestigious title in the financial world.
